commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=4c1692af39b96f4577c19b2bbf1062075e899615)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an env-controlled policy helper that disables default Google Gemini CLI runtime provider/backend registration unless `OPENCLAW_ENABLE_GOOGLE_GEMINI_CLI_HARNESS` is set, preserves setup backend registration, and updates Google docs, metadata, and tests.

PR surface: Source +15, Tests +75, Docs +48. Total +138 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main and `v2026.6.11` register `google-gemini-cli` by default, while the PR head hides that runtime registration unless the new env flag is set. I did not run a live upgrade flow in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the remaining blockers are compatibility/product direction, migration policy, and contributor real behavior proof rather than a narrow safe automation repair.

target.title: feat(google): gate Gemini CLI runtime harness behind explicit opt-in
target.author: jason-allen-oneal
